common.commentSectionDesc: Switch to the comments panel to follow discussions, give quick feedback, and keep all decisions right in the same task.

auth.emptyDescription: New activity will appear here when it arrives.
auth.loginDescription: Enter your email and password to continue.
auth.registerDescription: Fill in the details below to start using Chronelis.
auth.notesImageOnlyError: Only image uploads are supported for task notes
auth.notesInvalidDescription: Unable to find a valid task.
auth.notesPageDescription: Write rich text notes for the task and store HTML directly.
auth.notesViewOnlyDescription: You only have permission to view this note. Editing requires task management access.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

pomodoro.pageDescription: Stay in rhythm with focus and break cycles tied to the current task.
pomodoro.invalidTaskDescription: Unable to find a valid task.
pomodoro.currentTaskDescription: Pomodoro stays attached to this task so you keep the right work context.

focus.label: Focus session
focus.hint: Concentrate on the main task and avoid multitasking.

shortBreak.label: Short break
shortBreak.hint: Take a brief break, stand up and relax your shoulders.

longBreak.label: Long break
longBreak.hint: Take a longer break to recharge for the next cycle.

crystalBell.label: Crystal Bell
crystalBell.description: Bright and clear resonance for focus/break transitions.

digitalChime.label: Digital Chime
digitalChime.description: Compact digital tone that stands out when you wear headphones.

softBloom.label: Soft Bloom
softBloom.description: Softer tone when you want a less jarring cue.

deepGong.label: Deep Gong
deepGong.description: Deep, full tone for a more distinct rhythm change.

woodBlock.label: Wood Block
woodBlock.description: Short wooden hit for a quick, clean signal.

auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.quickLinkGoalsDescription: Track short and long term goals
auth.quickLinkActivityDescription: Review the action history in this project
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Check your email and click the verification link to activate your account.
auth.title: Workspaces
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to collaborate with your team
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your registered email to receive a password reset link.

list.createDescription: A workspace contains your projects and members.
list.emptyDescription: Create your first workspace to start organizing projects and collaborating with your team.
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete workspace "{{name}}"?
list.deleteConfirmGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace?
list.deleteWarning: This workspace will be removed from your working list after you confirm.

auth.panelWelcomeDesc: Create an account to start managing workspaces, tracking progress and collaborating real-time with your team.
auth.panelForgotLeftDesc: Enter the email you used to register, and Chronelis will send a password reset link to your inbox right away.
auth.panelForgotRightDesc: Go back to sign in and continue managing your workspaces, projects, and tracking work progress.
auth.panelSignInRightDesc: Sign in to continue handling tasks, calendar plans and update progress for your projects.
auth.strengthWeakHelper: Needs more length and character variety
auth.strengthFairHelper: Should add uppercase, numbers and special characters
auth.strengthGoodHelper: Add 1-2 more criteria to be stronger
auth.verifyEmailSent: A verification email has been sent. Click the link in the email to activate your account.
auth.resetLinkSent: We've sent a password reset link to your inbox.
auth.registerSuccessDesc: Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.layoutDescription: Organize workspaces, track project progress, assign tasks and collaborate real-time with your team.
auth.verifyAccountSubtitle: Enter the verification code from your activation email
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: You can now log in with your new password.
auth.verifyEmailChangeSubtitle: Confirm the token in your email to complete the address update
auth.emailUpdatedDesc: Please log in again with your new email to continue.
auth.emailChangeSuccessDesc: Please log in again with your new email.
auth.tokenInvalidOrExpired: Token is invalid or has expired. Please try again.

landing.heroDescription: Calendar, Kanban, To Do — same data. Comments, notes, pomodoro built into every task. No need to jump between tools.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your team needs to run projects, in one system.
landing.featuresDescription: From member management to real-time work tracking — Chronelis keeps context seamless.
landing.featureWorkspaceDesc: Create workspaces, invite members, assign roles and manage your team in one place.
landing.featureProjectDesc: Organize work by project, track goal progress and see the full execution flow.
landing.featureCalendarDesc: Drag and drop directly on the calendar to create and adjust work schedules for each task.
landing.featureKanbanDesc: View status by columns or compact lists for quick daily processing.
landing.featureCommentDesc: Discuss right inside the task drawer, write full notes instead of switching elsewhere.
landing.featurePomodoroDesc: Start focus sessions tied to tasks, pick notification sounds and get back in flow without losing context.
landing.featureNotificationDesc: Get instant notifications on changes, with activity logs to track work rhythm.
landing.featurePermissionDesc: Every action follows workspace and project management permissions, keeping things safe.
landing.viewsTitle: Switch views seamlessly without losing context.
landing.viewsDescription: Calendar for scheduling, Kanban for flow, To Do for quick work, Goals for progress tracking.
landing.ctaTitle: Create your first workspace, invite your team and start running projects.
landing.ctaDescription: No complex setup needed. Chronelis is ready from minute one.
landing.ctaFeature2: Switch views quickly without losing context
landing.ctaFeature3: Pomodoro and Focus Mode tied to tasks

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noWorkspaces: No workspaces yet. Create your first workspace to get started.

sidebar.goalPlanningPrompt: Break down the goal "{{title}}" into concrete tasks, point out the main blocker, necessary dependencies, and a short rollout plan for the current project.
sidebar.projectPlanningPrompt: Create an execution plan for project "{{name}}" over the next 7 days, prioritizing blockers, dependencies, and the tasks that should be created or updated immediately.
sidebar.projectDialogDescription: Update the project name and summary so the sidebar stays clear.
sidebar.goalDialogCreateDescription: Add a goal directly from the sidebar for the selected project.
sidebar.goalDialogEditDescription: Update the goal title, type, and current status.
sidebar.deleteProjectDescription: Are you sure you want to delete project "{{name}}"?
sidebar.deleteGoalDescription: Are you sure you want to delete goal "{{name}}"?
sidebar.deleteProjectWarning: This project and its related goals, tasks, schedules, and comments will be removed.
sidebar.deleteGoalWarning: This goal will be removed from the project goal list after you confirm.
sidebar.deleteProjectGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
sidebar.deleteGoalGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
sidebar.workspaceMissing: Unable to find the current workspace.
sidebar.projectMissing: Unable to find the project to update.
sidebar.goalProjectMissing: Unable to find the goal project.
sidebar.goalMissing: Unable to find the goal to update.

myWork.title: My Work
myWork.subtitle: Blocked tasks · Ready tasks · Personal dispatch
myWork.boardHero: Check blockers, pick one task and start working.
myWork.boardDescription: My Work brings all your work into one place: blocked tasks that need attention first, and ready tasks you can focus on right away.
myWork.metricBlockedDesc: Unblock these tasks first to clear bottlenecks.
myWork.metricAttentionDesc: Overdue tasks and tasks due today.
myWork.metricHighPriorityDesc: High or urgent tasks to handle first.
myWork.blockedDesc: Tasks waiting on blockers or dependencies. Resolve these first to keep things moving.
myWork.readyDesc: Tasks ready for Focus Mode or Pomodoro right away.
myWork.noBlocker: No blockers to handle right now.
myWork.noReady: No tasks are fully ready yet.
myWork.filterDesc: Use filters to focus on the work that matters right now.
myWork.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description, blocker or project name...
myWork.blockedQueueDesc: Tasks waiting on dependencies or blocker notes. Resolving these unblocks the rest.
myWork.readyQueueDesc: Tasks ready for Focus Mode. Pick one clear task and complete it in short sessions.
myWork.emptyBlocked: No blocked tasks match current filters.
myWork.emptyReady: No ready tasks match current filters.
myWork.aiNoTask: No task for AI to use as project context.
myWork.blockerDefault: Task waiting on dependency or needs blocker note.
myWork.noBlockerDigest: No notable blockers. You can move to ready tasks.
myWork.emptyAllTitle: No tasks match the current filters.
myWork.emptyAllDescription: Try clearing filters or refresh to pull your latest assigned work.
myWork.aiTaskPrompt: Summarize the next step for task "{{title}}" in plain language, highlight current blockers, and suggest the most immediate action in the current project.
myWork.aiSmartPrompt: Based on the current priority task "{{title}}", propose the order to resolve blockers, the next action to take, and how to keep momentum across the remaining work in this project.

kanban.title: Kanban Board
kanban.description: Drag and drop tasks between columns by workflow
kanban.addColumnDesc: Create a new column on the kanban board.
kanban.noColumnsDesc: Add your first status column to get started
kanban.noPermission: You don't have permission to arrange tasks on this Kanban board
kanban.noPermissionColumn: You don't have permission to create status columns in this project
kanban.createTaskDesc: Choose status, assignee, deadline and dependencies upfront so the task enters the board clearly.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.pageDescription: Task schedule by week or month
calendar.readOnlyDescription: You can only view this calendar. Creating and editing schedules requires project management access.
calendar.openTodoForDay: Open To Do for this day
calendar.permissionCreateTask: You do not have permission to create tasks in this project
calendar.permissionUpdateTask: You do not have permission to update schedules for this task
calendar.permissionEditTask: You do not have permission to edit this task
calendar.permissionDeleteTask: You do not have permission to delete this task
calendar.createTaskDesc: Schedule upfront, assign members, deadline and dependencies so the task appears clearly on the calendar.

todo.title: To Do
todo.pageDescription: Manage tasks as a list and drag to reorder
todo.quickCreatePlaceholder: Type a title, then open the full create form...
todo.quickCreateDisabledPlaceholder: You do not have permission to create tasks
todo.quickCreateHint: The title will be kept, then you can assign owner, deadline, estimate, dependencies, and blockers in the create form.
todo.createFromTodoDescription: Start from the title you just entered, then add the information needed for handoff so the To Do list stays clean and easier to use.
todo.tryAnotherDate: Try another date or clear the date filter.
todo.noMatchingTasks: No tasks match the current filters
todo.changeFiltersHint: Try changing the goal or priority filters.
todo.noReorderPermission: You do not have permission to reorder tasks in this project
todo.noManagePermission: You do not have permission to update tasks in this project

task.createDescription: Fill in key information upfront so the task is clear, easy to assign and track.
task.createSuccess: Task created with full initial information
task.title: Title
task.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description so anyone assigned can understand what to do.
task.assigneeNoneDesc: Leave assignee empty for this task
task.assigneeSearch: Search by name, email or role...
task.scheduleRequired: Calendar tasks require specific start and end times.
task.scheduleOptional: Optional — schedule now to show this task on the calendar.
task.scheduleSet: Scheduled — task will appear on the calendar view.
task.dependencySearchPlaceholder: Search by title, status or priority...
task.blockerNotePlaceholder: e.g. waiting for client data approval, or waiting for API from another team.
task.statusError: Please select an initial status for the task
task.estimatedError: Estimated duration must be a valid number of minutes
task.scheduleRequiredError: Calendar tasks require both start and end times
task.scheduleBothError: If scheduling, please fill in both start and end times
task.scheduleOrderError: End time must be after start time
task.scheduleBothRequired: Please enter both start and end times
task.scheduleEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time
task.noPermission: You do not have permission to update this task
task.unassignedDesc: This task currently has no assignee
task.aiPlanPrompt: Break down task "{{title}}" into concise execution steps, identify blocking dependencies and suggest updates to apply immediately in the current project.
task.duplicateBanner: Duplicate mode — review the content, then save to create a new task.
task.searchAssignee: Search by name, email or role...
task.scheduleEndValidation: End time must be after start time.
task.dependenciesHelp: Select tasks that must be completed first and note any blockers outside the system.
task.searchDependencyPlaceholder: Search by title, status or priority...
task.blockerNotePlaceholderLong: Example: waiting for data from client or decision from management
task.noBlockedBy: This task has no dependency on other tasks.
task.noBlocking: No tasks are waiting for this task to complete.
task.blockedTooltip: Task is waiting on a blocker or dependency
task.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
task.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete task "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
task.deleteAlreadyPending: This task is already pending deletion. You can undo it or wait for it to finish.
task.deleteImmediateEffect: This task will be removed from task lists and related schedules immediately after you confirm.
task.commentNoPermissionPlaceholder: You do not have permission to comment on this task
task.commentsFeedDescription: Optimized for quick replies, fresh updates, and keeping important decisions attached to the task.
task.commentsFirstThreadHint: Start the first conversation to keep decisions inside the task.
task.commentsVisibleCount: {{count}} comments are visible in the same discussion thread.
task.commentsReadOnlyTitle: You are viewing this discussion in read-only mode
task.commentsReadOnlyDescription: You can still follow every reply here. Task management permission is required to post comments or reply directly.
task.commentsEmptyDescription: When new discussion happens, every reply will appear here in a clean feed.
task.focusDescription: Focus on working with this task
task.focusPageDescription: Keep one task at the center, cut the noise, and retain only the context needed to finish it.
task.focusPlanningPrompt: Break down task "{{title}}" into concise execution steps, highlight blockers and main dependencies, then suggest the most realistic update for the current project.
task.focusNoSchedule: No schedule has been set for this task yet.
task.focusChecklistBlockedDescription: Task is still blocked and needs clarification before you start.
task.focusChecklistOpenNotesDescription: Capture decisions, references, and reminders you want to keep during the focus session.
task.focusChecklistStartSessionDescription: Use Pomodoro to keep momentum and return cleanly when the session ends.
task.focusNotFound: Unable to find the task for Focus Mode.

admin.accessDenied: You do not have system administration access.

sidebar.logoutDescription: Are you sure you want to log out of Chronelis?

users.title: Manage users
users.description: Update user information and manage system-level roles.
users.dialogDescription: Only changed fields are sent to the backend to avoid data conflicts.
users.verifiedDescription: Turn account verification on or off

roles.title: Manage roles
roles.description: Create roles, edit details, and manage permissions for each role.
roles.dialogDescription: Role names are saved in uppercase to stay consistent with the backend.
roles.activeDescription: Enable or disable this role in the system
roles.permissionsDialogDescription: The backend handles add/remove permission actions individually instead of replacing the whole set.
roles.noPermissions: This role has no permissions yet.
roles.roleNotFound: Unable to find the role to manage permissions.
roles.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this role? ({{target}})
roles.deleteConfirmDescriptionGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this role?

permissions.title: Manage permissions
permissions.description: Manage endpoint permissions and system modules.
permissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by API path, method, module...
permissions.dialogDescription: Edit endpoint paths and HTTP methods precisely according to the backend contract.
permissions.moduleDialogDescription: Only permissions without a module can be assigned to a new module.
permissions.allAssigned: All permissions already belong to a module.
permissions.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this permission? ({{target}})
permissions.deleteConfirmDescriptionGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this permission?
permissions.removeModuleDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this module? Module {{module}} will be removed from all permissions.
permissions.removeModuleDescriptionGeneric: Are you sure you want to remove this module?
permissions.validationRequired: Permission name and API path cannot be empty

goals.noGoals: No goals in this project yet.
goals.pageDescription: Short-term and long-term goals in this project · Your role: {{role}}
goals.createOwnerDescription: Set a goal for the project and assign a manager if needed.
goals.createMemberDescription: Set a goal for your project.
goals.readOnlyBadge: Read-only: only managers can create or edit goals
goals.emptyDescription: Create your first goal to track progress.
goals.editOwnerDescription: Update the goal details and manager scope.
goals.editMemberDescription: Update the goal details. Only the owner can change manager user or team.

tasksPage.emptyNoTasks: This goal has no tasks yet
tasksPage.emptyNoTasksDescription: Attach tasks to this goal from Kanban or To Do.
tasksPage.emptyFilteredDescription: Try clearing filters or using a different search.

toast.deleteScheduled: Goal "{{name}}" has been scheduled for deletion. You have 5 seconds to undo.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.tooltipNoProject: Select a project to use AI Assistant
ai.suggestion1: Break down current work into easy-to-start steps for this week.
ai.suggestion2: Find the biggest bottleneck and suggest tasks or updates to prioritize.
ai.suggestion3: Review current goals and suggest a brief plan to push progress.
ai.previewCreated: AI has created a plan preview
ai.needPreviewFirst: You need to create a preview before applying.
ai.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one valid action to apply.
ai.applySuccess: AI plan has been applied to the project
ai.sheetDescription: Describe what you want to clarify. AI will suggest tasks, schedules and suitable updates, and you decide which items to actually apply.
ai.promptTitle: Ask AI to suggest a plan
ai.promptLabel: What you want AI to help with
ai.promptPlaceholderLong: Example: Break down the big task into easy-to-start steps, identify the main blocker and suggest a work schedule for this week.
ai.promptHint: You can describe briefly, AI will convert it into an action plan.
ai.previewFallbackSummary: AI has created a list of changes that can be applied partially to this project.
ai.footerNote: You always decide. Only the items you select will be applied to the project.
ai.noProjectDesc: Open a project from the sidebar so AI can understand the context and suggest more accurately.
ai.statusDisabledTitle: AI Assistant is disabled on backend
ai.statusDisabledDesc: Enable PROJECT_ASSISTANT_ENABLED and configure Gemini to start using.
ai.statusReadyDesc: You can view proposals and apply each item safely.

settings.title: Project Settings
